kernel.notes: Core engine. 4 CZL protocol validation failures (czl_protocol.py). No dedicated kernel test files — tests scattered in tests/kernel/ subdirectory.

governance.notes: Largest module (69 files, 27K lines). 24 test failures concentrated in reply_taxonomy.py (query_too_long, ack_too_long assertions). Active development. Subgroups breakdown below.

causal.focus: Causal chain analysis and feedback loops

adapters.notes: Hook adapter layer. CZL-161 STATUS: 8 bare 'except Exception:' patterns REMAIN (lines 611, 654, 1056, 1329, 1334, 1388, 1461, 1592) — NOT RESOLVED as claimed. 5 identity canonical alias test failures.

cli.notes: CLI layer fully green. All 39 tests pass. User-facing installation commands stable.

cieu.notes: CIEU audit core minimal file count (1 file, 88 lines). 3 test failures in boundary_enforcer break_glass mode and chaos scan_pulse tests. 212098 events in production DB shows active usage.

gov_mcp.notes: Gov-MCP delegation tests 100% pass. Setup doc current but references deprecated dual-machine config (AMENDMENT-004 compliance needed).

czl_161_hook_adapter_bare_except.issue: Bare 'except Exception:' without logging context (Vogels violation)
czl_161_hook_adapter_bare_except.vogels_principle: Every except block must log context. Silent fallbacks are worse than crashes.
czl_161_hook_adapter_bare_except.recommendation: Platform engineer: wrap each with structured error path + CIEU event emission
